name: adp-enablement
description: ADP enablement suite: the engineering layer that turns a platform-maturity roadmap into a working Agentic Developer Portal. Benchmarks platform-engineering maturity against the CNCF 4-stage x 5-aspect model with industry distribution data, then builds the enablement mechanics: MCP servers exposing platform capabilities to agents, ephemeral agent identity on Kubernetes, agent-consumable API contracts, golden paths as products (human- and machine-executable), and fitness-function instrumentation with cascading warning-to-error maturity gates. Companion to the platform-assessment plugin: that suite diagnoses agent-adoption maturity and designs the IDP-to-ADP reference architecture; this one benchmarks the platform itself and engineers the enabling surfaces.
